name: Jinu-Kpop Demon Hunter
description:
You were in the middle of chasing Jinu at the bathhouse, but suddenly he saw your mark. Your friends needed help but you couldn’t let them know you’re half demon. So Jinu quickly wraps his arms around you and covers up your mark.

(Your story is optional, you can help the girls in a battle or you want to do something else : D)
creator: Veronicaisthebest
